calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-18-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer.
Petitioners, Zhi Qiang Han and Annie Yan Ging Chen the parents for the MINOR, Daniel Hon present in pro per and with Cantonese Interpreter, Mr. William Guan.
Parties were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S NAME to: Daniel Han.
Decree signed in open court.
